hotels.description_en:
Featuring stunning views of Victoria Harbour with pockets of greens, Little Tai Hang offers cosy accommodation in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. It is only a 5-minute walk from Exit A1 of Tin Hau MTR Station. Free WiFi is available in all areas.
Little Tai Hang is a 10-minute walk from Causeway Bay shopping area, while Central and Wanchai can be approached within 15 minutes by public transportation. The property is a 40 km away from Hong Kong International Airport.
Designed with a loving devotion to detail, rooms here will provide a flat-screen TV with international channels and Apple TV. Enjoy a cup of tea while looking out at Victoria Harbour or garden, all rooms are equipped with a private bathroom. For guests' comfort, slippers and free toiletries are offered.

hotels.description_it:
Situato a Hong Kong, sulla Causeway Bay e a soli 5 minuti di cammino dall'uscita A1 della stazione della MRT di Tin Hau, il Little Tai King offre una vista incantevole sul Victoria Harbour con le sue zone verdeggianti, sistemazioni accoglienti e la connessione WiFi gratuita nell'intero edificio.
Il Little Tai Hang dista 10 minuti di cammino dalla zona dello shopping di Causeway Bay, 15 minuti a piedi dal centro cittadino e dalla zona di Wanchai e 40 km dall'Aeroporto Internazionale di Hong Kong.
Tutte le camere presentano ambienti particolarmente curati nei dettagli, una TV a schermo piatto con canali internazionali e Apple TV, una vista sul Victoria Harbour o sul giardino e un bagno privato con pantofole e set di cortesia.

hotels.name: Hotel Stage
hotels.description_fr:
Located in the heart of Yau Ma Tei and just a 3 minutesâ€™ walk from Jordan subway (MTR) station, Hotel Stage offers guests an ideal base to experience both the dynamics of Kowloonâ€™s commercial district and the cultural riches of surrounding neighbourhoods.
This 97-room hidden gem features a restaurant serving Italian inspired cuisine.
Located on 2/F and 3/F is our versatile and diverse event space which is thoughtfully created for corporate functions and private events. Accommodating up to 200 persons, our meeting venues are equipped with state-of-the-art technology catering to all business and social demands. Parking spaces are also available for the attendees (subject to availability).

hotels.name: Disney Explorers Lodge
hotels.description_fr:
Discover a world of adventure at the Disney Explorers Lodge as you answer the call to explore and immerse in the exotic surroundings, rich cultures, and tasty discoveries that have inspired so many beloved Disney stories. Be awed by the exotic accommodations with rooms facing and furnished according to the four unique tropical climates of Asia, Oceania, South America and Africa Serving international cuisines from the five continents and a large outdoor pool, this hotel perfectly captures the lodge motto of â€œad explorare et somniareâ€ (â€œto explore and dreamâ€).
Meet Disney Friends at Dragon Wind breakfast buffetâ€‹
Savor the tastes of ancient wisdom with signature delights from rural and classical Provincial China. Make unforgettable memories when some of your favorite Disney Friends stop by.
